ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* The year in which the season took place */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Unique name of the season */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the season (e.g., 'Upcoming', 'Ongoing', 'Completed') */,
  "sports_type" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., 'Football', 'Basketball') */,
  "location" TEXT /* Primary location or region where the season is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the season */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the season record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the season record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of participant (team or individual) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the participant */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team or individual was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach or manager */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the participant record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance statistic entry */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage score achieved */,
  "pre_rank" TEXT /* Pre-season ranking (NR if not ranked) */,
  "final_rank" TEXT /* Final ranking (NR if not ranked) */,
  "high_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved during the season */,
  "low_score" INTEGER /* Lowest score achieved during the season */,
  "average_score" TEXT /* Average score achieved during the season */,
  "total_games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the participant in the season */,
  "games_won" INTEGER /* Number of games won by the participant in the season */,
  "games_lost" INTEGER /* Number of games lost by the participant in the season */,
  "games_drawn" INTEGER /* Number of games drawn by the participant in the season */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the participant in the season */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance statistic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance statistic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "score_types" (
  "score_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score type */,
  "score_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the score type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the score type */,
  "weightage" TEXT /* Weightage assigned to the score type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the score type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "pre_rank" TEXT /* Pre-season ranking (NR if not ranked) */,
  "final_rank" TEXT /* Final ranking (NR if not ranked) */,
  "rank_points" INTEGER /* Points associated with the ranking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ranking record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ranking record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance statistic entry */,
  "score_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of score */,
  "score_value" TEXT /* Value of the score */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific game in which the score was achieved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the score record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES performance_stats ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_score_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_type_id") REFERENCES score_types ("score_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
